---
title: "Tutorials"
css: styles/tutorials.css
---


<div class="area-title">Statistical Inference</div>
<div class="area-tutorial">
<a href="/tutorials/sampling-distribution/sampling-distribution.html">
<div class="card">
<img src="/imgs/Blank_Sticky_Note_clip_art.svg" width=100%>
<span class="tutorial-title">Sampling Distribution</span>
</div>
</a>
<a href="/tutorials/bootstrapping/bootstrapping.html" style="display: none;">
<div class="card">
<img src="/imgs/Blank_Sticky_Note_clip_art.svg">
<span class="tutorial-title">Bootstrapping</span>
</div>
</a>
<a href="/tutorials/AB-testing/ab-test.html" style="display: none;">
<div class="card">
<img src="/imgs/Blank_Sticky_Note_clip_art.svg">
<span class="tutorial-title">A/B Testing</span>
</div>
</a>
</div>
